svg.title: Single-deck passenger-car beam model aligned with KRV chapter 11
svg.desc: Corrected single-deck passenger-car beam model with side-wall belts, inter-window posts, opening boundary post segments, variable center sill zones, bolster lines, and a cylindrical roof bow shown only in cross section.
svg.text: Beam-only topology for member forces and bending moments in wagon_fem. Dimensions are schematic.

cc:Work.dc:title: Single-deck passenger-car beam model aligned with KRV chapter 11
